all.title: Live Stream Recordings
all.description: Watch saved live stream recordings on StreamArchive. TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, and Kick recordings — saved automatically and ready to rewatch or download.

tiktok.title: TikTok Live Recordings
tiktok.description: Watch and download saved TikTok live recordings on StreamArchive. Add your favourite TikTok streamers and their Lives are recorded automatically — no screen recorder needed.

faqs.question: How do I save TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: Add the TikTok username of any streamer you want to follow on Stream Archive. Their TikTok Lives are recorded automatically every time they go live — no screen recorder needed, everything is saved in the cloud.

faqs.question: Do I need a screen recorder to save TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: No. Stream Archive is a cloud-based TikTok live recorder. There's no app to install, no phone left running, and no black screen issues. TikTok Lives are captured server-side in high quality automatically.

faqs.question: Can I watch TikTok Lives I missed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once you add a TikTok streamer on Stream Archive, all their Lives are recorded and saved. You can rewatch any TikTok Live recording anytime — even if the original broadcast has ended.

faqs.question: Can I download TikTok live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any TikTok live recording as a video file for offline viewing — no watermark added.

faqs.question: Do TikTok Lives disappear after they end?
faqs.answer: Yes, TikTok does not save Lives after the broadcast ends. That's why Stream Archive exists — add your favourite TikTok streamers and their Lives are captured and stored so you can watch them later.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving TikTok Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and start saving TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

twitch.title: Twitch Stream Recordings & VODs
twitch.description: Watch and download saved Twitch stream recordings on StreamArchive. Add your favourite Twitch streamers and their streams are saved automatically — a permanent Twitch VOD archive.

faqs.question: How do I save Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Add the Twitch username of any streamer you want to follow on Stream Archive. Their streams are recorded automatically every time they go live — no software needed, everything is saved in the cloud.

faqs.question: Do Twitch VODs expire?
faqs.answer: Yes. Twitch VODs expire after 14 days for regular streamers and 60 days for Partners. Stream Archive saves Twitch streams permanently — recordings never expire and are always available to watch or download.

faqs.question: Can I download Twitch stream recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any Twitch stream recording as a video file for offline viewing. A built-in Twitch VOD downloader.

faqs.question: How is this different from Twitch VODs?
faqs.answer: Twitch VODs expire after 14–60 days and can get muted or deleted. Stream Archive saves Twitch streams as a permanent backup — recordings never expire, stay in full quality, and are available even if the streamer deletes their VODs.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and start saving Twitch streams from your favourite streamers. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

faqs.question: Does it record all types of Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gaming, IRL streams, Just Chatting, or any other category — every Twitch stream is recorded automatically regardless of content type.

youtube.title: YouTube Live Recordings
youtube.description: Watch and download saved YouTube live recordings on StreamArchive. Add your favourite YouTube channels and their Lives are saved automatically — a reliable backup when replays disappear.

faqs.question: How do I save YouTube Lives?
faqs.answer: Add the YouTube channel of any streamer you want to follow on Stream Archive. Their Lives are recorded automatically every time they go live — no software needed.

faqs.question: Can I watch YouTube Lives I missed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once you add a YouTube channel, all their Lives are recorded and saved. You can rewatch any YouTube live recording anytime — even if the original replay was deleted or failed to process.

faqs.question: How is this different from YouTube replays?
faqs.answer: YouTube replays can fail to process, get deleted, or go private. Stream Archive saves YouTube Lives as an independent backup — recordings are always available regardless of what happens to the original.

faqs.question: Can I download YouTube live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any YouTube live recording as a video file for offline viewing.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving YouTube Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and start saving YouTube Lives from your favourite channels. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

keywords: bigo live screen recorder black screen

faqs.question: How do I save Bigo Lives?
faqs.answer: Add the Bigo username of any streamer you want to follow on Stream Archive. Their Lives are recorded automatically every time they go live — no Bigo Live recorder APK needed, no screen recording.

faqs.question: Why do I get a black screen when recording Bigo Live?
faqs.answer: Black screen issues are common with Bigo Live screen recorder apps. Stream Archive avoids this entirely — Bigo Lives are captured directly from the cloud, so there's no black screen, no workarounds needed.

faqs.question: How do I fix the Bigo Live black screen?
faqs.answer: The easiest fix is to skip screen recording altogether. Stream Archive is a cloud-based Bigo recorder that captures Lives server-side in high quality. No black screen problems, no apps to configure.

faqs.question: Do I need a screen recorder for Bigo Live?
faqs.answer: No. Screen recorders for Bigo Live often cause black screen issues or low quality captures. Stream Archive is a cloud-based Bigo Live recorder — no app to install, no black screen.

faqs.question: Can I download Bigo Live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium users can download any Bigo Live recording as a video file for offline viewing. Every recording can also be watched instantly in the browser.

faqs.question: Is Stream Archive free for saving Bigo Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and start saving Bigo Lives from your favourite streamers. Premium plans unlock downloading recordings and extended storage.

about.all:
## Live Stream Recordings

Browse saved live stream recordings from streamers on StreamArchive. Add your favourite streamers and their live streams are recorded automatically — rewatch or download anytime.

### What You'll Find Here

Recordings from TikTok Lives, Twitch streams, YouTube broadcasts, Bigo Lives, Tango streams, Kick streams, and more. All saved automatically and ready to watch on demand.

### Watch and Download

Every recording is available to watch instantly through the built-in player. Premium users can download recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### Supported Platforms

Stream Archive supports TikTok live recording, Twitch VOD saving, YouTube live recording, Bigo Live recording, Tango recording, Kick stream recording, AfreecaTV recording, and Pandalive recording.
about.tiktok:
## TikTok Live Recordings

Watch saved TikTok live recordings on StreamArchive. TikTok Lives disappear the moment they end — Stream Archive is a TikTok live recorder that saves them automatically so you can rewatch anytime.

### TikTok Lives Saved Automatically

Add your favourite TikTok streamers and their Lives are recorded automatically in the cloud. No TikTok screen recorder needed, no phone left running overnight. Every TikTok Live is captured in high quality.

### Watch and Download TikTok Recordings

Every TikTok live recording is available to watch instantly in your browser. Premium users can download TikTok recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### TikTok Live Recorder — No Screen Recording Required

Forget unreliable screen recording apps that cause black screens or dropped frames. Stream Archive is a cloud-based TikTok recorder that captures Lives server-side. No app to install, no storage issues on your device.

### Record TikTok Lives on Any Device

Stream Archive works entirely in the cloud. There's nothing to install — no desktop app, no browser extension. Whether you're on PC, laptop, or mobile, TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers are captured automatically.

### Free TikTok Live Recorder

Sign up free and start saving TikTok Lives from your favourite streamers. Upgrade to premium for downloading recordings and extended storage.
about.twitch:
## Twitch Stream Recordings

Watch saved Twitch stream recordings on StreamArchive. Twitch VODs expire — Stream Archive saves them permanently so you never lose your favourite streams.

### Twitch VODs That Never Expire

Twitch VODs expire after 14–60 days. Stream Archive is a Twitch stream recorder that saves streams permanently in the cloud — no expiry, no deleted archives. Your favourite Twitch content is preserved.

### Watch and Download Twitch Recordings

Every Twitch stream recording is available to watch instantly — no ads, no interruptions. Premium users can download Twitch VODs as video files for offline viewing.

### Twitch Stream Recorder — No Screen Capture Needed

Forget screen capture software or desktop recording tools. Stream Archive is a cloud-based Twitch recorder that captures streams server-side. No extra CPU load, no Bandicam, no OBS recording required.

### Twitch VOD Downloader

Premium users can download any Twitch stream recording. A built-in Twitch VOD downloader — save your favourite streams as video files.

### Free Twitch Stream Recorder

Sign up free and start saving Twitch streams from your favourite streamers. Upgrade to premium for Twitch VOD downloads and extended storage.
about.youtube:
## YouTube Live Recordings

Watch saved YouTube live recordings on StreamArchive. YouTube replays can disappear — Stream Archive saves them automatically so you always have access.

### YouTube Lives Saved Automatically

YouTube live stream replays can fail to process, get deleted, or go private. Stream Archive is a YouTube live recorder that captures Lives automatically — a reliable backup that's always available.

### Watch and Download YouTube Recordings

Every YouTube live recording is available to watch instantly in your browser. Premium users can download recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### YouTube Live Recorder — No Screen Recording Needed

Forget traditional screen recording software. Stream Archive is an online YouTube recorder that captures live streams in the cloud. No desktop app, no browser extension, no computer left running overnight.

### Free YouTube Live Recorder

Sign up free and start saving YouTube Lives from your favourite channels. Upgrade to premium for downloading recordings and extended storage.

about.bigo:
## Bigo Live Recordings

Watch saved Bigo Live recordings on StreamArchive. Bigo Lives disappear when they end — Stream Archive is a Bigo Live recorder that saves them automatically, with no black screen issues.

### Bigo Lives Saved Automatically

Add your favourite Bigo streamers and their Lives are recorded automatically in the cloud. No Bigo Live screen recorder APK needed, no black screen problems. Streams are captured server-side in high quality.

### Watch and Download Bigo Recordings

Every Bigo Live recording is available to watch instantly in your browser. Premium users can download recordings as video files for offline viewing.

### No Black Screen — Ever

Screen recording apps for Bigo Live often cause black screen issues. Stream Archive captures everything server-side — no screen recorder needed, no APK downloads, no black screen frustration.

### Free Bigo Live Recorder

Sign up free and start saving Bigo Lives from your favourite streamers. No app to install, no black screen — just automatic cloud recording.
